name: Avatar Bodyweight Coach
included_features: 36 no-equipment bodyweight exercises across 6 movement domains
neutral, male and female avatar selections
3D Asset Lab for open/free model, rigging and mocap source review
local asset manifest workflow for GLB, glTF, VRM, FBX, BVH and ZIP candidates
licence guardrails before committing third-party 3D assets
important_limitations: No third-party photorealistic human model or mocap file is bundled until redistribution rights are verified.
The current production avatar remains a local SVG fallback.
True photorealistic exercise animation requires licensed or verified open 3D assets, rigging and animation clips.
